cl.m: Added from Infinity Insanity WeiDU logs

sum: Adds Calin, a Neutral Good human Blade Master NPC to BG2 with a romance for non-evil females, banters with all Bioware NPCs, and content for both SoA and ToB.
no: This mod introduces Calin, a human Blade Master to BG II. Calin is neutral good and will romance a female who is Elf, Half-elf, Human and of non-evil alignment.

co.scn: Select Calin's dialogue timer: (default is one hour; please note that only timered talks are affected by this)
co.tp2n: 15 minutes real time minimum between dialogues
